notes: 6.8 kg (bowling-ball mass) launched horizontally at high speed from height => airliner-drop Q23; strongest single mass signal in the set
Thrown straight up (angle 90, speed>0), no air => free-fall Q5 signature; one of 10 near-identical runs
Dropped (speed 0) vertically from a height, no default air => free-fall drop; best fit for stone-from-roof Q17
Light ball (0.45 kg) from ground with air on => golf-ball-on-fairway Q22
Heavy ball (10 kg) launched horizontally from height 100 with air on => cliff cannonball Q16
